extra_descs.desc:
Here is a list of secret stuff:
[20199] Key to open Lighthouse
[20198] A shirt made for Immortals (only)
[20199] Load this cook and give her the corpse of a dead crab for food
[20197] Or just load the food directly =P
[20198] tour guide who gives you stuff =)
[20196] A surfboard
[20104] coconut
At night, mobs sleep. In morning they wake. Take note some wake and sleep at different times.

long_desc: An impressive plaque hangs on the wall.

extra_descs.desc:
This seashell is rather small, and has a sprical like shape with a broader
base that narrows to the tip.

long_desc: A petite, spiral-like seashell lies here, its tip pointing skywards.

extra_descs.desc:
This underwater treasure is a rock-like substance formed in the sea.  Is has
a pinkish-orange coloring to it.

long_desc: A genuine piece of sea coral lies here.

extra_descs.desc:
@n
North: Forbidden Forest
West: An Abandoned Lighthouse
South: Konolua Beach

long_desc: A weather-beaten sign solemnly stands here.

extra_descs.desc:
A small hole has been cut at the top of this coconut, transforming the husk
into a cup of some sort.

long_desc: A coconut which has fallen from its tree lies forgotten here.

extra_descs.desc:
A coconut tree has broad leaves suitable for providing shade from the sun in
the morning.  Getting the coconuts down is the a real problem though...

long_desc: A tall and sturdy coconut tree is rooted here.

extra_descs.desc: This boulder has been weathered and has developed dangerous, sharp edges.

long_desc: A jagged boulder pokes up from the sand here.

extra_descs.desc: The nest is made of straw, firmly weaved by a clever bird.

long_desc: A nest made of straw is here.

extra_descs.desc:
The egg is white, round, with specks of brown all over it.  It has been
removed from its nest, and the egg is fast growing cold.

long_desc: An egg with brown specks is here.

extra_descs.desc:
This harp is made of a metal that shifts and changes its colors every now
and then.  Carved into the column of it are strange elvish designs, while the
neck of the harp is a simple S-shape.  @Rplay harp@n to produce sensational
music.

long_desc: An ornate harp has been carelessly left here.

extra_descs.desc:
A picture has been drawn on this sign, warning swimmers to be careful of deep
underwater currents and giant waves that may sweep them away into the deep
ocean.

long_desc: A warning sign has been placed here.

extra_descs.desc:
Engraved on this sacred blade is the name of the sword.  Forged by a
competant and highly skilled blacksmith and enchanted by an adept and powerful
sorceror, this blade holds the potential to create HORRENDOUS amount of damage.
The blade itself is made of a bluish metal, yet it cannot be determined for the
tones of blue are always changing.  You may say the blade itself is made of a
solid type of flowing liquid, while the hilt has been creatively designed to
form the shape of Leviathan, the legendary dragon that sleeps beneath the ocean.
@W@uTo Use this blade:@n At the expense of 50 mana points, this blade will
constantly heal you for 10 hp every 2-3 seconds.  To use this command, type
@BEXECUTE FUSION@n.  For 100 of your own hp you can damage the opponent for 1000
in return, provided that it is not a player character.  A drawback to this
ability is the time taken to fully execute the damage, it takes time to recharge
before striking down the opponent.  To use this type @BPERFORM AURORAFALL@n.

long_desc: A blade exuding arcane powers has been planted into the ground here.

extra_descs.desc:
This wooden chest must have been here for a long time.  The wood is already
decaying and there are several holes in it.

long_desc: A sturdy wooden chest lies opened here.

extra_descs.desc:
This key is losing its silvery glint to rust and has little twist here and
there.

long_desc: A crude rusty key is half-buried here.

extra_descs.desc:
The paper has somehow managed to survived a few centuries, but the writings
on it has not.  Written on it are the words: The bla e you seek is magi al y enc
ante , an only few pe ple wh has survived th wra h of the ocean is al owed to
wield this weapon.  To rec i e it say the word 'liq iddr s'

long_desc: A small piece of yellowed paper has been discared here.

extra_descs.desc:
This appears to be a broken fragment from a shell.  Its surface glitters with
a kind of white dust, while the prism shard itself is a bright pink.  Prisms are
known to be the main material used to make enchanted weapons and armors.

long_desc: A glowing fragmented shard is lying here.

extra_descs.desc:
The white powdery substance on this shell glitters, while the color of the
shell itself is a bright pink.  A few scratches can be found on the shell, or
otherwise it would have been flawless.  Prisms are known to be the main material
used to make enchanted weapons and armors.

long_desc: A glowing piece of shell is lying here.

extra_descs.desc: The @Rred@n cushion is big, nice, and exceptionally nice to cuddle or sit on.

long_desc: A big, @Rred@g cushion has been carefully placed here.

extra_descs.desc:
The @Bblue@n cushion is big, nice, and exceptionally nice to cuddle or sit
on.

long_desc: A big, @Bblue@g cushion has been carefully placed here.

extra_descs.desc:
The @Yyellow@n cushion is big, nice, and exceptionally nice to cuddle or sit
on.

long_desc: A big, @Yyellow@g cushion has been carefully placed here.

extra_descs.desc:
This @MP@Wr@Mi@ms@Wm @MA@Wn@Mk@ml@We@mt@n is made from prism, a rare mineral
that is created after being buried under the sand for many years.  The white
powdery substance it is made from makes it glitters, enhancing the beauty of
this wonderful object.

long_desc: A glittering anklet sparkles silently here.

extra_descs.desc:
This @MP@Wr@Mi@ms@Wm @MD@Wr@Me@ms@Ws@n is made from prism, a rare mineral
that is created after being buried under the sand for many years.  The white
powdery substance it is made from makes it glitters, enhancing the beauty of
this wonderful object.

long_desc: A nearly transparent dress lies here, sparkling silently.

extra_descs.desc:
This @MP@Wr@Mi@ms@Wm @MC@Wo@Ml@ml@Wa@Mr@n is made from prism, a rare mineral
that is created after being buried under the sand for many years.  The white
powdery substance it is made from makes it glitters, enhancing the beauty of
this wonderful object.

long_desc: A glittering collar sparkles alone.

extra_descs.desc: The sign says: When you wish to go home, just @CJUMP@n into the water.

long_desc: A wooden sign has been planted here.

extra_descs.desc:
@n
SECRETS
   There are a list of things that will not appear anywhere on this zone.  They
are for immortals only ;) Type olist to bring out a list of them.  Items
classified under this will be those with VNUM 20170+.  Load them and enjoy.

QUESTS
   A power sword can be obtained by braving the deep waters (move far away from
the island) and wait.  Then go north, and SEARCH around.  Finally say the words
'liquiddreams' and receive this magnificent blade!
   The Old Fool in the old hut may seem to be talking rubbish, but they are
actually clues to the words liquiddreams ;)

   Special commands like dive and dig can be performed at the places where they
say you can do so.

FEATURES
   Wildlife: Crabs and seagull sleep at night, if you like watching these
creatures you may want to observe them from day till night.

   Prism: The old fool will offer to make prism equipments for you.  Simple DIG
around for a few prism shards of shells and greet him to get a list of
instructions.

   Danger: Although Konolua beach may seem peaceful on the outside, GUYS
especially should keep a look out for the siren and be wary of them.  Their
voices can stun you!
   Deep waters should also be avoided, if you don't want to drown.

WORDS BY THE BUILDER
Thanks everyone who has helped me in the making of this zone.  It took me 7
days to finish it, followed by a few more days of editing.
There may be a lot more hidden errors, so mail me if you see any ;)
OVERVIEW type @Rgoto 20100@n and look ;)

INDEX:
1)Overview
2)Notes by the Author
3)Features
4)Secrets
Type look <number> to read the different entries.

This book has been made for immortals to give them a rough idea of this area.
A simple, plain hardcover book, the pages contains many useful information and
secrets of the Sapphire Islands.  Type look index to look at it.

long_desc: A simple guidebook of @WSapphire Islands@g lies here.

extra_descs.desc:
Deathly Nirvana is a blade made of pure runestone.  Its edge is razor-sharp
and dangerously thin - a characteristic that enables it to slice through any
material with utmost ease.  @RSlash@n releases its hidden power.

long_desc: A sword with an evil aura is glowing here.

extra_descs.desc:
A vanilla icecream!  The icecream is slowly melting, and the white substances
is dripping from the sides of the cone!

long_desc: A @Wvanilla-flavoured@g icecream in a cone is slowly melting here.

extra_descs.desc:
This hat is made by Elixias to his cousin Azwick.  Now isn't that
thoughtful..

long_desc: Someone has left a hat here.

extra_descs.desc:
This bag looks deflated and strangely is weighs nothing!  A spell have been
cast on it so that you can put as many things as you like into the bag.

long_desc: A simple bag lies here.

extra_descs.desc:
The glass of this pair of spectacle is heavily tinted in @Cblue@n!  Looking
through it will probably make everything look @Cblue@n as well.

long_desc: Someone has dropped a pair of glasses here.

extra_descs.desc:
This pair of shorts is made of a blue fabric and has been specially made for
Immortals of all shapes and sizes.

long_desc: A new pair of hawiian style shorts has been left here.

extra_descs.desc:
This surfboard will allow you to ride any wave big or small.  Enchanted with
the ability to use the [teleport] command.

long_desc: A surfboard capable of riding the waves has been dropped here.

extra_descs.desc:
This crab has been cooked in thick, hot and spicy sauce by the local chef and
has been placed in a small dish.  Powdery spices is sprinkled on the crab itself
to enhace its taste.

long_desc: A crab cooked with spicy sauce is in a dish here.
short_desc: a crab cooked in spicy sauce

extra_descs.desc:
The label reads: I-wear - We specialize in making clothes for happy
immortals.

This Hawiian t-shirt is made from a brilliant blue fabric, carefully and
specially designed to fit any immortal.  A label hangs by the collar of the
shirt.

long_desc: A neatly folded, @Cocean blue@g T-shirt lies here.

extra_descs.desc: The rust makes it difficult to read.

The key is crudely made, and it has rusted over the many years.  Small
engravings can be found on the key, the rust makes it difficult to see.

The reddish-material is rust, which the key seems to be collecting after many
many years.

long_desc: A key that is covered in a reddish-material lies forgotten here.
